---
title: "Preoperative neoadjuvant chemotherapy or immunotherapy in head and neck cancer: A systematic review and meta-analysis of surgical risk and pathologic response"
date: 2025-08-01
author:
  - name: Pedroso, Caique Mariano
  - name: De Pauli Paglioni, Mariana
  - name: Normando, Ana Gabriela Costa
  - name: Chaves, Aline Lauda Freitas
  - name: Kowalski, Luiz Paulo
  - name: De Castro Júnior, Gilberto
  - name: Matos, Leandro Luongo
  - name: Willian Junior, William Nassib
  - name: De Oliveira, Thiago Bueno
  - name: De Marchi, Pedro
  - name: Harada, Guilherme
  - name: Mak, Milena Perez
  - name: Lima, Carmen Silvia Passos
  - name: Viani, Gustavo Arruda
  - name: Moraes, Fabio Ynoe
  - name: Gouveia, Andre Guimaraes
  - name: Santos-Silva, Alan Roger
  - name: Marta, Gustavo Nader
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Critical Reviews in Oncology/Hematology"
  volume: 212
  doi: "10.1016/j.critrevonc.2025.104742"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Preoperative neoadjuvant chemotherapy or immunotherapy in head and neck cancer: A systematic review and meta-analysis of surgical risk and pathologic response</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
